examples: Pudge is an adorable cat with a moustache and a craft show, and is basically the most hipster cat on the Internet.
Flocked by carrion birds who need him to cut their meals into beak-sized chunks, Pudge the Butcher hones his skills with blades that grow sharper the longer he USES them.
He has the slight pudge of a person who spends too much time with a laptop on his lap.
Pudge hooked a teammate and is merrily munching away?
